effect.subject: Italic (Arial Italic)
effect.reserved_for: journal titles in references, or where the approved copy deck specifies it

rule_text: Do not combine bold + italic in email body. Italic (Arial Italic) is only for journal titles in references or where the approved copy deck specifies it.
intent: Restrict italic to reference styling and forbid stacked bold+italic emphasis in body.
summary: Avoid bold+italic in email body; use Arial Italic only for journal titles in references or as specified in approved copy deck.
